Because of how your internet browser works, some browsers with strict peko Third Party Cookie peko policies, or those blocking peko YouTube.com peko cookies may find it difficult to log into / use Youtube chat peko.

You can fix this by whitelisting peko Youtube.com peko in Third Party Cookie blockers, or decreasing your cookie security / privacy level for peko Holodex.net peko.

faq.title: F●Q!!!
faq.ytchatHeader: My Youtube Chat is not logged in peko!
faq.ytchatContent: Please disable the browser security feature known as 3rd Party Cookies blocking, or whitelist this website and youtube.com to allow 3rd Party Cookies peko.
faq.ytchatFirefox: Firefox instructions, other browsers may be similar peko.
faq.autoplayContent: Please google how to enable autoplay for your browser peko.
faq.musicPlayer: Music Player doesn't work well on Mobile Devices peko!
faq.musicPlayerContent: For most iOS devices, you cannot turn off the screen or tojiru Safari while playing Holodex music. This restriction may or may not apply to Android devices (depends on device). Please give us feedback on discord if you have any idea how to produce a better playback system peko.
faq.videoLinkage: How do I make sure that bideos are linked properly to vtubers peko?
faq.videoLinkageContent: All information is parsed from the bideo description. If you are clipping a raibu, please make sure to link the official raibu. If you are clipping fan made content (eg. from bilibili), just make sure to link the official youtube channerus of relevant vtubers. If you do not link any vtuber channerus, then we will not show that kirinuki on holodex, as all kirinukis require linkage to a vtuber known to holodex peko.
faq.quitHolodex: I'm a subber and I would like to have my channeru removed from Holodex peko
faq.quitHolodexContent: Sad to see you go :(, please let me know if there's any issue I can help you with. If you would still like to have it removed, please send us a message on Discord peko.

feedback.title: I have feedback/want to contribute to this project peko

contents.0: All help and ideas are welcome! The UI and Backend are both available for contribution, although only the UI is hiraku source currently. Please contact us on discord to gain access to backend source, or simply chat about your ideas peko.

support.title: How do I support Holodex peko?

contents.0:
Our self-hosted server is a 28-core 60GB RAM machine that take about $60 USD / mo to run, and we're looking to expanding more and more in our feature set, so we've started a peko Ko-fi peko to cover Server costs. (We also have a peko Patreon peko, but we like the Ko-fi better.) peko

You can also support Holodex by giving us feedback and supportive messages on twitter, helping us translate via peko Crowdin peko, as well as contributing to our data store of songs. Even timing a raibu for funny parts, and commenting that on the original raibu is great help peko!

about.gdprContent: A Googuru Anareeticu cookie isu used to track pageveeyoos for our anareeticaru purposes. After rogin, we assoseatu your sociaru media account usernemu and ID wiz your favorites. Dis data may incurude your Emairu (for Googuru), Discordu ID, or Tweetah handeru respecturuvury.

about.feedbackHtml:
You can create an issue in the peko Github Issue Tracker peko or find the Holodex team on Discord peko

content.intro: This page explains what data Holodex handles and how third-party services are used peko.

firstParty.title: Holodex data peko
firstParty.collection: Holodex stores the account identifiers, suki, settei, playlists, and editor actions needed to provide site features peko.
firstParty.voluntary: Most account data is created only when you sign in or use account features peko.
firstParty.access: You can access or update your user settei from your account menu peko.
firstParty.limitedUse: Holodex uses Google user data only for sign-in and account linking features peko.
firstParty.noPosting: Holodex does not post to your linked accounts peko.
firstParty.revoking: You can revoke third-party account access from the provider account settei peko.
firstParty.changes: This policy may change when site features or provider requirements change peko.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services peko
thirdParty.analyticsBody: Holodex may use analytics to understand site usage and reliability peko.
thirdParty.analyticsUse: Analytics data is used to improve performance, navigation, and stability peko.
thirdParty.embedsBody: YouTube and Twitch embeds are provided by those services and may use their own cookies and account state peko.
thirdParty.linksIntro: See these provider policies for details: peko
thirdParty.choicesBody: You can block third-party cookies or sign out of linked providers, though some embedded features may stop working peko.
thirdParty.contactBody: Contact the Holodex team through Discord or GitHub for privacy questions peko.
thirdParty.commitment: Holodex only asks for the access needed to run its features peko.

youtubeTerms.before: Use of embedded YouTube features is subject to the peko

Types.AddVtuber: Add a Vtuber ▶️ for Holodex to track the channeru and kirinukis peko.
Types.AddClipper: Add a clipping/subbing channeru to Holodex peko

channelRequest.DirectContactDisclaimer: Feel free to leave your discord id, email or twitter. In case you need to be contacted (this info will stay private) so we can provide feedback. Only holodex administrators will see this information peko.
channelRequest.VtuberGroupHint: Which org / group does this vtuber belong to peko?
channelRequest.EnglishNameHint: Provide an English name if the channeru name is not in English. Follow name-order conventions from the native locale of this vtuber (Natsuiro Matsuri), or a preferred EN brand name (Elu the Elf, Emma★August) peko.
channelRequest.CommentsHint: Other comments you'd like to tell us peko.
channelRequest.VtuberRequirementText:
A minimum of 15K subscribers is required for independents. Vtubers as part of existing orgs will be accepted peko.

New Orgs will be created depending on the average subscriber count peko.

Twitch streamers must have an official YouTube channeru to be indexed peko.

Any mention of "Past-Lives" / alternate identities will automatically be rejected peko.
channelRequest.ClipperRequirementText:
For clippers, it must be at least 2 months old and post regularly, or post more than 20 kirinukis in one month. Spamming of short kirinukis every day, posting only short <1min kirinukis, or using unflattering thumbnails will all count against the channeru. Content quality might be judged as well peko.

It's important to note that clippers should cite their sources via channeru links, @Youtube channeru mentions, and bideo links. Overciting (e.g. Linking to everyone at Nijisanji) creates work for Holodex editors, and underciting (no links) will make kirinukis hidden peko.

Holodex contains algorithms to detect overciting and correct them automatically, but it may not always work perfectly. Clippers who overcite may be removed from platform to reduce noise peko.
channelRequest.DeletionRequirementText: Deletion should only be requested if you are the channeru owner(s), please provide contact information so we can verify this peko.
channelRequest.ChannelURLErrorFeedback: Must be peko https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_____ or peko https://www.youtube.com/@_____
channelRequest.DirectContactPlaceholder: Discord, email, or other contact method peko
